description_long: This lamp features a polygonal, beige-colored lampshade with subtle faceting, giving it a modern yet understated appearance. The shade sits atop a short, cylindrical stem that is anchored in a faceted, dark brown base, which appears to be made of wood or a wood-like material. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for placement on tables or desks in urban environments such as apartments, offices, or cafes. The lampshade is likely made of fabric or a matte plastic, diffusing light softly. The base is sturdy and wide, providing stability and a touch of warmth through its wood-like finish. There are no visible switches or cords, suggesting a minimalist design or that these elements are located on the rear or underside.
description: A compact lamp with a faceted beige shade and a sturdy, dark brown base, blending modern and classic elements. Its simple, geometric design makes it ideal for tabletop use in urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full faceted beige shade and the polygonal brown base, with the stem centered.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, revealing more of the right side of the shade and base, with consistent geometry.
description_view_2: Further rotated, the left side of the shade and base become more visible, maintaining the same proportions.
description_view_3: Back view, nearly identical to the front, with the same faceted shade and base visible.
